title: The Void
description: The eerie silence before anything begins.

title: Daniel
description: Daniel's theme. Plays during his narration in chapter 1.

description: Collin's theme. Energetic and a little chaotic.

description: An alternate version of Collin's theme.

title: Alice
description: Alice's theme. Plays when she makes her entrance.

description: An ominously dark doorway appears. Something stirs.

title: The Hallway
description: The floor opens. Things go downhill fast.
